data.biography: Qi Shenghan (祁圣翰) is a Chinese pop singer, film and television actor, and host. He graduated from the Orchestra Department of Shenyang Conservatory of Music. In 2010, he participated in the “COVERSATR” of the Hong Kong Fashion Shopping Fair and won the championship.  In 2012, he released his first solo single "Wanna Be Your Love" and made his official debut. In 2015, he won the Annual Music Progress Award at the Music Pioneer Chart Awards Ceremony.
data.name: Qi Shenghan

data.biography: Hank Qi é um cantor, ator e modelo chinês nascido em 25 de maio de 1988, em Shenyang, província de Liaoning, China. Ele se formou no Departamento de Orquestra do Conservatório de Música de Shenyang. Em 2012, ele fez sua estreia musical com o single solo “Wanna Be Your Love”. Ele participou do programa de talentos da TV “Happy Boys” em 213 e ficou entre os 10 primeiros. Seus créditos dramáticos incluem “The Locked Room” (2019) e em 2022 ele estrelou o filme “0,1% World”.

Guan Xiaotong (关晓彤) Born on September 17, 1997 in Beijing, China, Guan Xiaotong is a widely recognized Chinese actress. Often dubbed a “nepo baby,” Guan was born into an artistic family—her father, Guan Shaozeng, is a well-known actor, which gave her early access to the entertainment industry. This lineage, helped her rise swiftly through the ranks.

Starting her career as a child star, Guan has built a prolific body of work spanning drama, romance, historical epics, and fantasy.
data.name: Guan Xiaotong

data.biography:
关晓彤，演员、歌手，毕业于北京电影学院表演系本科班。童星出身的她被誉为“国民闺女”。

　　2001年，完成个人出道作品《烟海沉浮》。2005年，凭借奇幻动作片《无极》被观众认识 。2008年，因在年代爱情剧《幸福还有多远》中饰演大丫而崭露头角。2014年，凭借时尚情感剧《一仆二主 》获国剧盛典观众喜爱的新人女演员奖。2015年，发行个人音乐专辑《十八》。

　　2016年，因主演都市爱情剧《好先生》而获得广泛关注，并凭借该剧获得第23届上海电视节白玉兰奖最佳女配角奖；同年，与郑爽、周冬雨和杨紫共同被评为“90后四小花旦” 。2017年，主演的青春校园励志剧《极光之恋》播出。2018年7月23日，主演的青春热血格斗剧《甜蜜暴击》播出 。2019年1月4日，关晓彤为中国电影频道评选的演技派新生代四小花旦（另有张子枫、文淇和张雪迎）之一。
data.name: 关晓彤

data.biography: Quan Hiểu Đồng là nữ diễn viên, người mẫu, ca sĩ, MC người Trung Quốc thuộc dòng họ Qua Nhĩ Giai thị, dân tộc Mãn Châu. Cô bắt đầu đóng phim từ năm 4 tuổi, đã tham gia hơn 100 tác phẩm điện ảnh và truyền hình.
data.name: Quan Hiểu Đồng

data.biography:
關曉彤，演員、歌手，畢業於北京電影學院表演系本科班。童星出身的她被譽為“國民閨女”。

2001 年，完成個人出道作品《煙海沉浮》。2005 年，憑藉奇幻動作片《無極》被觀眾認識 。2008 年，因在年代愛情劇《幸福還有多遠》中飾演大丫而嶄露頭角。2014 年，憑藉時尚情感劇《一僕二主 》獲國劇盛典觀眾喜愛的新人女演員獎。2015 年，發行個人音樂專輯《十八》。

2016 年，因主演都市愛情劇《好先生》而獲得廣泛關注，並憑藉該劇獲得第 23 屆上海電視節白玉蘭獎最佳女配角獎；同年，與鄭爽、周冬雨和楊紫共同被評為“90 後四小花旦” 。2017 年，主演的青春校園勵志劇《極光之戀》播出。2018 年 7 月 23 日，主演的青春熱血格鬥劇《甜蜜暴擊》播出 。2019 年 1 月 4 日，關曉彤為中國電影頻道評選的演技派新生代四小花旦（另有張子楓、文淇和張雪迎）之一。
data.name: 關曉彤

data.biography: Cornelio Sunny is an Indonesian actor.  His father is from a Mexican descent, while his mother is from Palembang.
data.name: Cornelio Sunny

data.biography:
Jack Andrew Lowden (born June 2, 1990) is a Scottish actor. Following a four-year stage career, his first major international onscreen success was in the 2016 BBC miniseries War & Peace, which led to starring roles in feature films. Starring as River Cartwright in the Apple TV series Slow Horses since 2020, he has received nominations for a Primetime Emmy Award and a Golden Globe Award. 

Lowden starred as Eric Liddell in the 2012 play Chariots of Fire in London. In 2014, he won an Olivier Award and the Ian Charleson Award for his role as Oswald in Richard Eyre's 2013 adaptation of Ibsen's Ghosts. 

In 2013, he began to take on substantial roles in British television series and feature films, including The Tunnel (2013) and '71 (2014). He also had leading roles in the BBC miniseries The Passing Bells (2014) and War & Peace (2016). Other screen roles include the title role as golfing legend Tommy Morris in Tommy's Honour (2016); the starring role of Morrissey in the biopic England Is Mine (2017); a main-cast role as an RAF fighter-pilot in Christopher Nolan's Dunkirk (2017); a starring role in the Scottish Highlands thriller Calibre (2018, for which he won the British Academy Scotland Award for Best Film Actor); Lord Darnley in Mary Queen of Scots (2018); a starring role as a plantation owner in 19th-century Jamaica in the 2018 BBC miniseries The Long Song; and as Zak "Zodiac" Bevis in the 2019 comedy-drama WWE film Fighting with My Family.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jack Lowden, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jack Lowden

data.biography: Jack Lowden (* 2. Juni 1990 in Chelmsford, Essex) ist ein britischer Schauspieler.  Ab dem Jahr 2010 übernahm er kleinere Rollen in Fernseh- und Filmproduktionen. In der Filmbiografie England Is Mine, die beim Edinburgh International Film Festival 2017 Premiere feierte und am 4. August 2017 in die Kinos kam, übernahm er die Hauptrolle von Steven Patrick Morrissey. In Christopher Nolans Kriegsfilm Dunkirk aus dem gleichen Jahr ist Lowden ebenfalls in einer Hauptrolle zu sehen.

杰克·劳登（Jack Lowden），1990年6月2日出生于英格兰埃塞克斯，演员。

2010年，出演个人首部电视剧《Being Victor》，从而进入演艺圈。2014年，凭借舞台剧《群鬼》获得劳伦斯·奥立佛奖最佳男配角奖。2017年，凭借剧情片《敦刻尔克》获得更多关注。2018年，由其出演的剧情片《玛丽女王》上映。2019年，在传记片《为家而战》中饰演扎克。2024年，凭借主演的谍战剧《流人第三季》获得第76届黄金时段艾美奖剧情类最佳男配角奖提名。2025年5月23日，主演的电影《龙卷风》英国上映。
data.name: 杰克·劳登

data.biography:
傑克·勞登（傑克·洛登），1990 年 6 月 2 日出生於英格蘭埃塞克斯，演員。

2010 年，出演個人首部電視劇《Being Victor》，從而進入演藝圈。2014 年，憑借舞台劇《群鬼》獲得勞倫斯·奧立佛獎最佳男配角獎。2017 年，憑借劇情片《敦刻爾克》獲得更多關注。2018 年，由其出演的劇情片《蘇格蘭女王：爭名奪後》上映。2019 年，在傳記片《我的勁揪家族》中飾演紮克。2024 年，憑借主演的諜戰劇《流人第三季》獲得第 76 屆黃金時段艾美獎劇情類最佳男配角獎提名。2025 年 5 月 23 日，主演的電影《龍卷風》英國上映。
data.name: 傑克·洛登

data.biography: Hotaru Hazuki is a Japanese actress and gravure model known for her work on the stage and in more pink films. She has appeared in award-winning pink films and was given "Best Actress" awards at the Pink Grand Prix for her work in this genre in 1995 and 1996.
data.name: Hotaru Hazuki

data.biography: Hotaru Hazuki est une actrice et mannequin japonaise connue pour son travail sur scène et dans des films érotiques. Elle a joué dans des films érotiques primés et a reçu le prix de la « meilleure actrice » au Pink Grand Prix pour son travail dans ce genre en 1995 et 1996.
data.name: Hotaru Hazuki

data.biography: Choi Gwi-hwa is a South Korean actor, primarily known for his supporting roles in many popular films. Born March 3rd, 1978, he made his acting debut in a minor role in the 2009 film, 'Why Did You Come to My House?'. He has since appeared in many popular films, including 'Train to Busan', 'A Taxi Driver', and 'The Roundup', each hitting over 10 million viewers. He won 'Best New Actor' in 2017 for his role as Civvies Leader in 'A Taxi Driver', also winning ‘Best Supporting Actor’ the same year for his role as ‘Captain Jeon Il-man’ in ‘The Outlaws’. He then reprised his role in 2022 in 'The Roundup', which hit the 5th highest-grossing film in the Korean Box Office. He has also appeared in many popular television dramas, including 'Incomplete Life', 'Squid Game', and 'Bad Guys: Vile City'.
data.name: Choi Gwi-hwa

data.biography: 韩国演员，主要在许多热门电影中担任配角。他出生于 1978 年 3 月 3 日，在 2009 年的电影《你为什么来我家》中以一个小角色首次亮相。此后，他出演了多部热门电影，然后在 2014 年凭借热门电视剧《不完整的人生》跨界到电视剧。他还出演了《Shine or Go Crazy》（2015 年）和《My Golden Life》（2017-2018 年）。
data.name: 崔奎华

data.biography: Acteur sud-coréen.
data.name: Choi Gwi-hwa

data.biography: 韓國演員，主要在許多熱門電影中擔任配角。他出生於 1978 年 3 月 3 日，在 2009 年的電影《你為什麼來我家》中以一個小角色首次亮相。此後，他出演了多部熱門電影，然後在 2014 年憑藉熱門電視劇《不完整的人生》跨界到電視劇。他還出演了《Shine or Go Crazy》（2015 年）和《My Golden Life》（2017 - 2018 年）。
data.name: 崔奎華

data.biography:
Hwang Woo-seul-hye (born Hwang Jin-hee on August 10, 1979) is a South Korean actress. She made her acting debut as a "dumb blonde"-type character in the critically praised black comedy Crush and Blush (2008). Hwang has since played leading roles in the indie melodrama Lovers Vanished (2010), the TV sitcom I Need a Fairy (also known as Sent from Heaven, 2012), and the romantic comedy Virgin Theory: 7 Steps to Get On the Top (2014).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Hwang Woo-seul-hye

data.biography: Known for his boyish looks, skills as a dancer, and comedic timing Cheng Kang-Yeh was a fixture of many mid 70's Shaw Brothers films. He was married to Hong Kong Singer & Actress Deanie Ip from 1966 to 1973.
data.name: Cheng Kang-Yeh

data.biography: 郑康业以其孩子气的外表、舞者的技巧和喜剧的时机而闻名，是许多 70 年代中期邵氏电影的常客。他于1966年至1973年与香港歌手兼演员叶黛妮结婚。
data.name: 郑康业

data.biography: 鄭康業以其孩子氣的外表、舞者的技巧和喜劇的時機而聞名，是許多 70 年代中期邵氏電影的常客。他於 1966 年至 1973 年與香港歌手兼演員葉黛妮結婚。
data.name: 鄭康業

data.biography:
Justin Jacob Long (born June 2, 1978) is an American actor, comedian, director and screenwriter. He is known for his film roles in Galaxy Quest, Jeepers Creepers, Dodgeball, Accepted, Live Free or Die Hard, He's Just Not That into You, Drag Me to Hell, and Youth in Revolt.

He voiced Alvin Seville in the live-action Alvin and the Chipmunks film series. He is also known for his personification of a Mac in Apple's "Get a Mac" advertising campaign (2006–2009), and appeared as himself in Intel's "Go PC" campaign.

During an episode of the podcast Armchair Expert with Dax Shepard, Long revealed that he was the victim of a drugging and abduction during the filming of Youth In Revolt while in Michigan.

He had a relationship with Drew Barrymore that was on and off between 2007 and 2010. He also dated Amanda Seyfried from 2013 to 2015.

In January 2022, it was reported that he was dating actress Kate Bosworth. In April 2023, the couple announced their engagement and they married in May 2023, less than two months after getting engaged.
data.name: Justin Long

data.biography:
Justin Jake Long (* 2. Juni 1978 in Fairfield, Connecticut) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Synchronsprecher.

Justin Long ist der zweite von R. James Longs drei Söhnen. James Long ist Professor für Philosophie an der Fairfield University. Wendy Long, eine Schauspielerin am Broadway Theatre, ist seine Mutter. Seine Brüder, Damien und Christian Long, sind ebenfalls als Schauspieler tätig. Im Alter von 21 Jahren gab er sein Filmdebüt in Galaxy Quest – Planlos durchs Weltall an der Seite von Tim Allen. Bekanntheit erlangte er 2001 durch seine Rolle in dem Horrorfilm Jeepers Creepers. In den USA ist er in vielen Werbespots zu sehen, etwa 2003 für Pepsi. Seinen größten Vertrag hatte er mit Apple, in deren Werbespots er zwischen 2006 und 2010 an der Seite von John Hodgman als personifizierter Mac auftrat. 2014 stand er neben Michael Parks und Haley Joel Osment im Horrorfilm Tusk vor der Kamera. 2013 hatte Long einen Gastauftritt in der US-Sitcom Mom.

贾斯汀·朗（Justin Jake Long，1978年6月2日）是一位美国演员，参与演出过《惊心食人族》(Jeepers Creepers)、《爱情服务生》(Waiting...)、《录取通知书》(Accepted)、《疯狂躲避球》(Dodgeball)、 《疯狂金龟车》(Herbie: Fully Loaded)、《虎胆龙威4》(Live Free or Die Hard)、 及电视剧集 《Ed》、 在苹果公司的广告《Get a Mac》 中他又化身成为Mac 。

　　贾斯汀·朗1978年出生于美国美国东北部康涅狄格州的Fairfield，父亲是Fairfield University的哲学教授，母亲是一名教师，同时也曾是百老汇的戏剧演员，朗的哥哥和弟弟后来也都走上了表演的道路。Vassar College大学在学期间，朗把更多的精力放在了与表演相关的课外活动上，并加入了一个名为“LaughingStock”的喜剧剧团，表演才能很快受到关注，让他在一些独立电影中得到了角色，其中最知名的要属1999年的《银河追缉令》（Galaxy Quest）。

　　贾斯汀·朗留给多数观众的印象只是女主角身边可爱但带着点神经质的男友，而 他在参演的多部非主流影片中得到了更多磨练的机会，成名作《惊心食人族》和2006年主演的青春片《录取通知》（Accepted）之后，人们发现喜剧天赋和个人魅力在这个有着大男孩外表的演员身上得到了完美的融合。
data.name: 贾斯汀·朗
ジャスティン・ロング

data.biography:
積斯汀·朗（Justin Jake Long，1978 年 6 月 2 日）是一位美國演員，參與演出過《魔鬼屍餐》(Jeepers Creepers)、《愛情服務生》(Waiting. . . )、《冒牌天子門生》(Accepted)、《屎波快閃隊》(Dodgeball)、 《搞鬼甲蟲車》(Herbie: Fully Loaded)、《虎膽龍威 4》(Live Free or Die Hard)、 及電視劇集 《Ed》、 在蘋果公司的廣告《Get a Mac》 中他又化身成為 Mac 。

積斯汀·朗 1978 年出生於美國美國東北部康涅狄格州的 Fairfield，父親是 Fairfield University 的哲學教授，母親是一名教師，同時也曾是百老匯的戲劇演員，朗的哥哥和弟弟後來也都走上了表演的道路。Vassar College 大學在學期間，朗把更多的精力放在了與表演相關的課外活動上，並加入了一個名為“LaughingStock”的喜劇劇團，表演才能很快受到關注，讓他在一些獨立電影中得到了角色，其中最知名的要屬 1999 年的《星河救兵》（Galaxy Quest）。

積斯汀·朗留給多數觀眾的印象只是女主角身邊可愛但帶著點神經質的男友，而 他在參演的多部非主流影片中得到了更多磨練的機會，成名作《魔鬼屍餐》和 2006 年主演的青春片《冒牌天子門生》（Accepted）之後，人們發現喜劇天賦和個人魅力在這個有著大男孩外表的演員身上得到了完美的融合。
data.name: 積斯汀·朗

data.biography:
Ohm Thitiwat Ritprasert is an actor and model under GMMTV, best known for his role as Dean in the series "Until We Meet Again." He has a bachelor's degree from the Faculty of Mass Communication Technology at the Rajamangala University of Technology.

Ohm first entered the entertainment industry when he competed in Channel 8's "Asia New Star Model Contest 2016."
data.name: Thitiwat Ritprasert
ฐิติวัฒน์ ฤทธิ์ประเสริฐ

data.biography:
Wang Yibo (王一博) Born on August 5, 1997 in Luoyang, Henan Province, China, Wang Yibo is a multi-talented Chinese actor, singer, dancer, and professional motorcycle racer. He first rose to prominence as a member of the South Korean-Chinese boy band UNIQ, and later transitioned into acting with widespread acclaim.

Wang Yibo gained massive popularity in 2019 for his role as Lan Wangji in the hit fantasy drama The Untamed, earning international recognition. Beyond acting, he has served as a dance mentor on Chinese talent shows like Produce 101 and competed professionally as part of the Yamaha China Racing Team.
data.name: Wang Yibo

data.biography: 王一博（朝鲜语：왕일박 Wang Il Bak，英语：Wang Yi Bo，1997年8月5日－），艺名一博（朝鲜语：이보 I Bo，英语：Yi Bo），出生于河南洛阳，中国大陆男歌手、舞者、演员，湖南卫视《天天向上》节目主持人，同时也是摩托车车手与滑板手。2014年10月16日，以五人男子团体UNIQ出道，为团内主领舞、领Rapper，亦是团体中的忙内。2016年4月29日，正式成为湖南卫视综艺节目《天天向上》主持团天天兄弟的成员之一。同时，王一博也是一名职业摩托车车手，为中国万里达雅马哈车队（MLT YAMAHA）的签约车手，号码85，更于2019年的ARRC亚锦赛中国珠海站中获得D组新秀组冠军、混合组亚军的成绩。2019年出演电视剧《陪你到世界之巅》、《陈情令》，在剧中饰演“季向空”与“蓝忘机”一角。2019年8月，首次入选2019年福布斯中国名人榜并位列第71名。
data.name: 王一博

data.biography: 王一博（韓語：왕일박 Wang Il Bak，英語：Wang Yi Bo，1997年8月5日－)，藝名一博（韓語：이보 I Bo，英語：Yi Bo），出生於中國河南洛陽，中國男藝人。 2014年10月16日，以中韓男團UNIQ出道，為團內主領舞 、領Rapper，亦是團體中的忙內。
data.name: 王一博

data.biography:
Wang Yibo (chinês: 王一博, nascido em 5 de agosto de 1997) é um ator, dançarino, rapper e cantor chinês. Ele é membro da boyband sul-coreana-chinesa UNIQ. Em 2019, ele ganhou maior reconhecimento e popularidade com sua interpretação de Lan Wangji. Yibo entrou na lista Forbes China Celebrity 100 pela primeira vez, ocupando o 71º lugar; A Forbes China também o listou em sua lista 30 Under 30 Asia 2019, que consistia de 30 pessoas influentes com menos de 30 anos de idade que tiveram um efeito substancial em seus campos.

No mesmo ano, Wang Yibo competiu como piloto profissional de motocicletas na Yamaha China Racing Team.

王一博（朝鮮語：왕일박 Wang Il Bak，英語：Wang Yi Bo，1997 年 8 月 5 日－），藝名一博（朝鮮語：이보 I Bo，英語：Yi Bo），出生於河南洛陽，中國大陸男歌手、舞者、演員，湖南衞視《天天向上》節目主持人，同時也是摩託車車手與滑板手。2014 年 10 月 16 日，以五人男子團體 UNIQ 出道，為團內主領舞、領 Rapper，亦是團體中的忙內。2016 年 4 月 29 日，正式成為湖南衞視綜藝節目《天天向上》主持團天天兄弟的成員之一。同時，王一博也是一名職業摩託車車手，為中國萬里達雅馬哈車隊（MLT YAMAHA）的簽約車手，號碼 85，更於 2019 年的 ARRC 亞錦賽中國珠海站中獲得 D 組新秀組冠軍、混合組亞軍的成績。2019 年出演電視劇《陪你到世界之巔》、《陳情令》，在劇中飾演“季向空”與“藍忘機”一角。2019 年 8 月，首次入選 2019 年福布斯中國名人榜並位列第 71 名。
data.name: 王一博

data.biography: Orn Ornanong Panyawong is a Thai actress and model. The helps from World Vision Thailand gave Orn somewhat like a ladder for her to steps into the position of Miss Thailand 1992 and have the opportunity to graduated at Chulalongkorn University, Thailand, of Fine Arts. Orn has 2 sons and 6 adopted children, 3 by her and 3 by her husband.
data.name: Ornanong Panyawong

data.biography:
Yuna Taniguchi (谷口 夢奈, Taniguchi Yuna, August 17) is a Japanese voice actress from Osaka Prefecture. She is affiliated with Arts Vision.

She made her debut in January 2014 in the role of Gromazen R9 in the TV anime Robot Girls Z. In 2019, she played her first main character as Nao Nanao in the TV anime Ahiru no Sora.
data.name: Yuna Taniguchi

data.biography:
Yuna Taniguchi (谷口 夢奈, Taniguchi Yuna, 17 de agosto) es una actriz de doblaje japonesa de la prefectura de Osaka. Está afiliada a Arts Vision.

Hizo su debut en enero de 2014 en el papel de Gromazen R9 en el anime televisivo Robot Girls Z. En 2019, interpretó a su primer personaje principal como Nao Nanao en el anime televisivo Ahiru no Sora.
data.name: Yuna Taniguchi

data.biography:
Nicole Elizabeth Berger, (born November 27, 2003) is an American actress, musician and model. Shortly after starting to work in the modeling industry, Nicole began her acting career; performing in local theater where she starred in productions as Miss Honey in Matilda, Maria in West Side Story and in renditions of The Nutcracker.

Nicole had her first film debut in the 2011 film Goldberg- P.I. and within the next three years, she was cast as Young Beatrice in the 2014 comedy-drama The Longest Week, which earned the Breakthrough Award at the Georgia Film Critics Association Festival. Berger then landed the lead role of Grace Clarke in the 2016 drama All at Once which premiered at that year’s Napa Valley Film Festival and then screened at the Buffalo Dreams Fantastic Film Festival.  The actress then appeared in the fantasy-reality film The Place of No Words in 2019, where Nicole is featured as the enchanted-fairy Esmeralda. The film debuted in 2019 at the Tribeca Film Festival and then again at the Philadelphia Film Festival. Nicole next starred in the short-film, Ali’s Realm, as Ali; a role for which Nicole won both Best Actress at the 2020 Seattle International Film Festival, and the Lead Actress Award at the 2020 Best Shorts Competition.  During that same year, Nicole appeared in the short-film Five Teenagers Walk into a Bar, as well as the 2020 comedic crime-drama Clover; a role for which Nicole was nominated for Best Teen Actress in a Streaming Film Role by the 42nd Young Artist Academy Awards.

Nicole stars also alongside the late Cameron Boyce in the 2020 award-winning indie-thriller Runt as Cecily. The film premiered at the 2020 Mammoth Film Festival where it received Best Director and the Audience Award for Best Film.  Most recently, Nicole finished filming Black Spines, an upcoming horror-thriller film currently in post-production for 2023.  Nicole is currently a Theater, Dance and Media concentrator at Harvard University and will be graduating in 2027. In addition, she has recently joined The Harvard Callbacks (a university a cappella group). Keep up with the latest about Nicole on Instagram (@OfficialNicoleBerger), Facebook (Nicole Elizabeth Berger), LinkedIn (Nicole Elizabeth Berger) and Twitter (@NicoleEBerger).
data.name: Nicole Elizabeth Berger

data.biography: Yoon Jong-hoon is a South Korean actor.
data.name: Yoon Jong-hoon

data.biography:
尹仲勋（윤종훈），1984年2月15日生于大田广域市，韩国男演员。

2009年，通过KBS电视剧《千秋太后》出道。2009年出演MBC水木剧《一枝梅归来》。2013年5月出演Mnet音乐电视剧《Monstar》饰演申在鹿，10月出演tvN《请回答1994》饰演金杞泰。2014年1月出演tvN《急诊男女》饰演林容奎，2月出演SBS Plus《女人漫画皮鞋》饰演蔡延浩，6月出演SBS日日剧《就要相爱》，10月参演tvN电视剧《未生》，2016年客串出演《又是吴海英》，《青春时代》等热门韩剧。
data.name: 尹仲勋

data.biography: 尹鐘焄（윤종훈，Yoon Jong - hoon），又翻譯為尹仲勳、尹鍾薰，韓國男演員。

data.biography:
Darren Chen, also known as Chen Kuan-Hung (官鸿), is a Taiwanese actor and model born on January 15, 1995, in Taipei, Taiwan. He gained international fame for his roles in popular TV series, such as Meteor Garden (2018), where he portrayed Hua Ze Lei, and The Sleuth of the Ming Dynasty (2020), produced by Jackie Chan.

Darren began his acting career in 2016, making his debut in the youth fantasy series Proud of Love, followed by its sequel in 2017. Additionally, he starred in the romantic comedy film Oversize Love in 2020.

He is known for his striking height of 1.84 m and his sophisticated style, which has made him an icon in both acting and modeling. Darren is also passionate about sports like billiards and badminton.
data.name: Darren Chen

data.biography:
在由芒果娱乐出品，芒果娱乐承制，台湾偶像剧之母柴智屏担任金牌监制，90后人气女作家随侯珠同名热门IP改编的青春奇幻偶像剧《别那么骄傲》中，官鸿所饰演的男二林煜堂是暖男一枚，是沈熹(宋芸桦 饰)的青梅竹马。干净和安静是林煜堂最大的特征。如果说何之洲是强光手电，犀利的破开黑暗，明亮的让人晃眼，那林煜堂就是台灯，虽然照的不远，但是昏黄的温暖的光线，总是能带给人安全感。

　　2016年，搭档宋芸桦、佟梦实出演网剧《别那么骄傲》，剧中饰演

　　林煜堂一角；

　　2017年，搭档宋芸桦、佟梦实出演网剧《别那么骄傲2》，剧中饰演林煜堂一角。
data.name: 官鸿

data.biography:
在由芒果娛樂出品，芒果娛樂承製，台灣偶像劇之母柴智屏擔任金牌監製，90 後人氣女作家隨侯珠同名熱門 IP 改編的青春奇幻偶像劇《別那麼驕傲》中，官鴻所飾演的男二林煜堂是暖男一枚，是沈熹 (宋藝樺 飾) 的青梅竹馬。乾淨和安靜是林煜堂最大的特徵。如果説何之洲是強光手電，犀利的破開黑暗，明亮的讓人晃眼，那林煜堂就是枱燈，雖然照的不遠，但是昏黃的温暖的光線，總是能帶給人安全感。

2016 年，搭檔宋藝樺、佟夢實出演網劇《別那麼驕傲》，劇中飾演

林煜堂一角；

2017 年，搭檔宋藝樺、佟夢實出演網劇《別那麼驕傲 2》，劇中飾演林煜堂一角。
data.name: 官鴻
